title: Raw-hide
description: Overhauls how leather is obtained in survival mode.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/342ae95f5b5f8e4189f405b8cc43719f4a0554fb.png)
This mod overhauls how you obtain leather by replacing leather in most mob drops by instead dropping rawhides. These rawhides need to be scraped on a tanning rack, and then soaked in lye-water before being dried on a tanning rack.

Ash is made by either breaking a campfire, or by smelting charcoal in a furnace or blast furnace. To make lye-water, you need to add ash to either a water source or a cauldron.

 

*it also adds craftable saddles, otherwise this is pretty lightweight/small, good for modpacks, will have more types of hide added in time.
